subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta et al, spoken on 1920-01-08
subcodes.first_line: God willing you will go the day after tomorrow... We have lately received wonderful news -- more wonderful than you can imagine or suppose, but now is not the time to make it fully known.
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Shrines and Holy places, @growth of the Cause, @call to action
